content: Continuing interrupted session. Delegating to Planning Lead: Phase 1 — Architect must finish truncated sol-arb-architecture.md (sections 12-15 missing). Phase 2 — Spec Writer produces production spec-sol.md at /Users/mihail/projects/crypto-arbitrage/spec-sol.md using architecture + all prior research. Sequential: Architect first, then Spec Writer.
Completed sol-arb-architecture.md — grew from 2367 to 3727 lines. Added sections 12 (Database Schema completion), 13 (Configuration), 14 (HTTP API Specification), 15 (Implementation Roadmap).

Produced spec-sol.md — 2,677 lines, 104KB. 16 sections, 66 numbered requirements (REQ-001 through REQ-066), each with acceptance criteria. Covers full system: architecture, domain types, Solana DEX connectors, Binance CEX connectors, arbitrage engine, execution engine, risk management, rebalancing, DB schema, configuration, HTTP API, testing, deployment, implementation roadmap, requirements traceability matrix. Old SPEC.md preserved untouched.
Session complete. Both phases delivered successfully.
